text.title: Ads Budget Optimization Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of Ads Budget Optimization MUST enforce. Rationale + source per rule. Rules referenced by id from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Budget MUST partition 70% scaling / 20% optimizing / 10% test reserve. Deviations require documented reason.
rule.rationale: Without test reserve, account fossilizes; without scaling, winners under-fund; without optimization, mid-performers rot.

rule.statement: Reallocation MUST be driven by efficiency ratio (actual_ROAS / target_ROAS). Reallocating on raw conversions is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Raw conversion comparisons ignore profitability; efficiency-ratio normalizes across channels with different target multiples.

rule.statement: Single-step budget change MUST NOT exceed 20% per week unless backed by incrementality test or sample-size threshold.
rule.rationale: Larger steps blow up learning phase; smart bidding takes 7 days to re-equilibrate.

rule.statement: Underperformers MUST run >= 7 days OR >= sample-size threshold before cuts. Day-2 cuts based on early signal are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Day-2 signal is noise; premature cuts destroy winners that surface day 4-6.

rule.statement: Cross-channel rebalance MUST happen monthly. Weekly is over-fit; quarterly is too slow.
rule.rationale: Monthly cadence catches drift early without amplifying noise.

rule.statement: If applicability preconditions are unmet (see AGENTS.md Skip If), the methodology MUST be skipped and a one-line skip-reason logged.
rule.rationale: A named skip terminal keeps decision-tree leaves resolvable and prevents silent misuse on misfit inputs.
